docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,A MUNI CORP AS TO DEFENDANT L & K DEBRIS TABER, ARTHUR RAMON DOES 1 THROUGH 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-15-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-26-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-15-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-15-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
